name: forge-game-dev
description: Build Week prototype for a quest-driven Codex game-development companion.

scripts.test: tsx --test tests/contracts.test.ts tests/project-model.test.ts tests/prepared-quest.test.ts tests/quest-runner.test.ts tests/quest-completion.test.ts tests/dashboard-host.test.ts tests/workspace.test.ts tests/godot-executable.test.ts tests/godot-bootstrap.test.ts tests/legacy-sample.test.ts tests/dashboard-v2.test.ts tests/generated-workspace.test.ts tests/blueprint-planning.test.ts tests/project-creation.test.ts tests/generated-project-world.test.ts tests/generated-quest-runner.test.ts tests/generated-quest-recovery.test.ts tests/generated-quest-completion.test.ts tests/system-roadmap-planning.test.ts tests/system-quest-planning.test.ts
scripts.check:v0.1: npm run typecheck && npm run dashboard:build && tsx --test tests/prepared-quest.test.ts tests/quest-runner.test.ts tests/quest-completion.test.ts tests/dashboard-host.test.ts tests/workspace.test.ts tests/legacy-sample.test.ts
scripts.forge: npm run dashboard:build && npm run dashboard:host -- --v0.2
scripts.forge:v0.1: npm run dashboard:build && npm run dashboard:host -- --legacy
scripts.forge:v0.2: npm run dashboard:build && npm run dashboard:host -- --v0.2
scripts.showcase:check: tsc -p showcase/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run showcase:test && npm run showcase:build && npm run showcase:validate
scripts.visual:review:v0.2:reset: npm run dashboard:build && tsx src/visual-review/v0.2.ts reset
scripts.visual:review:v0.2:live: npm run dashboard:build && tsx src/visual-review/v0.2.ts live
